name: growgraph
description: An evolutionary graph operating model for managing the growth of complex systems.

scripts.validate:profiles: node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js profile profiles/software-specification/profile.json && node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js profile profiles/project-management/profile.json && node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js profile profiles/ai-employee/profile.json && node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js profile profiles/skill-runtime/profile.json
scripts.validate:pilots: node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js seed pilots/independent-implementation-001-conference-planning/graph-seed.json && node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js pilots/independent-implementation-001-conference-planning && node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js seed pilots/independent-implementation-002-software-specification/graph-seed.json && node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js pilots/independent-implementation-002-software-specification
scripts.validate:context-packs: node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js context-pack benchmarks/synthetic-context-reduction-v0 benchmarks/synthetic-context-reduction-v0/results/context-pack.json && node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js context-pack pilots/independent-implementation-002-software-specification pilots/independent-implementation-002-software-specification/results/context-pack.json
scripts.test:negative: node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js examples/invalid-missing-relation-target >/tmp/growgraph-negative.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js examples/invalid-relation-id-mismatch >/tmp/growgraph-negative-relation-id.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js examples/invalid-profile-object-kind >/tmp/growgraph-negative-profile-object.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js examples/invalid-profile-relation-type >/tmp/growgraph-negative-profile-relation.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-growgraph.js context-pack benchmarks/synthetic-context-reduction-v0 examples/invalid-context-pack-missing-explanation/context-pack.json >/tmp/growgraph-negative-context-pack.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1
scripts.test: npm run validate:minimal && npm run validate:benchmark && npm run validate:seed && npm run validate:profiles && npm run validate:ai-employee && npm run validate:skill-runtime && npm run validate:pilots && npm run validate:context-packs && npm run validate:profile-results && npm run seed:preview && npm run context:generate && npm run readiness:benchmark && npm run benchmark:synthetic && npm run test:negative

author: Rim Zabarov
